use_cases: Display loading state during data fetching operations in web applications
Show processing feedback during async operations like API calls
Indicate initialization state while applications are bootstrapping
Provide visual feedback during sync or data synchronization processes
Indicate optimization or background processing status to users
ai_summary: A multi-layered animated loading spinner component featuring concentric rotating rings with glowing effects and dynamic status text that cycles through various loading states. The component supports both light and dark modes with emerald/cyan color schemes, using CSS animations for smooth continuous motion. Built as a reusable React component with Tailwind CSS, it's designed to provide elegant visual feedback during data fetching, initialization, and processing operations.
